isolationNote: State + APIs live in this repo under project_key ai-video-generator; FFmpeg/providers/n8n run on Railway/n8n. Not merged into Resumora product routes.

dashboard.authNote: Bearer BOSSMIND_ORCHESTRATION_SECRET or BOSSMIND_AI_VIDEO_ADMIN_SECRET (stored in browser localStorage by operator — prefer SSO in production).

railwayWorker.note: Separate Render (UI) from Railway (orchestrator + FFmpeg); orchestrator reads NEON_DATABASE_URL and advances video_queue rows.

envSecrets.NEON_DATABASE_URL: shared or dedicated Neon branch — never commit
envSecrets.BOSSMIND_AI_VIDEO_ADMIN_SECRET: dedicated admin Bearer for AI Video APIs only (recommended)
envSecrets.BOSSMIND_AI_VIDEO_SCENE_WEBHOOK_URL: n8n or Railway handler returning scene video URL
envSecrets.BOSSMIND_AI_VIDEO_WORKSPACE: optional persistent workspace dir for concat inputs
envSecrets.BOSSMIND_AI_VIDEO_MISSION: optional mission override for prompts + publish manifest
envSecrets.FFMPEG_PATH: ffmpeg binary on worker PATH or absolute path

n8nWebhookActions: ingest_row — Google Sheets row → video_queue + optional video_scripts
queue_status — update queue status + payload merge
selfHealFlow: Worker failure → POST /api/orchestration/ai-video/self-heal-report with step, message, optional root_cause/fix_pattern from DeepSeek
n8n branches on retry_recommended + cap retries (anti-infinite-loop)

automationReality.inRepoToday: Schema, queue CRUD, orchestrator worker (DeepSeek → scenes → webhooks → TTS/Whisper → ffmpeg concat → publish webhook), job detail API, dashboard, n8n hooks, self-heal logging.
automationReality.outOfRepoRequired: Live provider accounts + OAuth refresh in n8n, Sheets inputs, public CDN for scene clips if webhooks return ephemeral URLs, production SSO on dashboard.
